pages.text: Occultism has 6 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:occult_core_t1, kubejs:occult_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:occult_core_t1$() gates: occultism:spirit_attuned_gem, occultism:otherstone, occultism:chalk_white, occultism:otherstone_pedestal
$(li)$(item)kubejs:occult_core_t2$() gates: occultism:storage_controller_base, occultism:chalk_gold, occultism:chalk_purple
$(li)$(item)kubejs:occult_core_t3$() gates: occultism:storage_controller, occultism:storage_remote, occultism:stable_wormhole
$(li)$(item)kubejs:occult_core_t4$() gates: enderio:travel_anchor, enderio:conduit_binder, enderio:item_conduit
$(li)$(item)kubejs:occult_core_t5$() gates: enderio:powered_spawner, enderio:vibrant_crystal
$(li)$(item)kubejs:occult_core_t6$() gates: enderio:dimensional_transceiver
